name: Get button: Check of availability of required interface elements
fullName: Book detail view screen: Get button: Check of availability of required interface elements

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search for "Libertie" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  Sing in screen is opened
And  All fields and links are displayed on Sign in Screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Get button: Check of availability of required interface elements

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Get button: Check of availability of required interface elements
